---
title: "\'Books\'  By Mrs. Sumner, Lady Frederick Bruce and Miss Yonge"
---

## \'Books\'  By Mrs. Sumner, Lady Frederick Bruce and Miss Yonge

**By Charlotte Mary Yonge**

**Published:** 1896
**Genre:** Non-fiction
**Format:** Article in Journal

**Publisher:** <i>Mothers in Council</i> 6.24 (Oct 1896) 241-248

### Notes

Very short notices of a large number of books.

---

[← Back to all letters](../../letters.html)
